context: Guidelines for reimbursing Koa Morning Star Bakery staff for approved out-of-pocket purchases made on the shop's behalf.
policy_name: Koa Morning Star Bakery Staff Reimbursement Policy

validation_rules.action: Hold reimbursement until a matching receipt is provided.
validation_rules.notes: Applies to ingredient top-ups, small equipment and market-stall supplies bought by Juno, Chloe or Tyler.
validation_rules.requirement: Any expense over $25 must include a legible itemised receipt showing merchant, date and total.
